name: Fire Drill
description: An unused effervescent Infinity-family weapon built around incendiary damage and the Infinity's endless-fire identity. It appears to be a cut variant rather than a normally obtainable weapon.

special.description: It is always incendiary, never consumes ammo, and fires in a fixed pattern that ignores normal recoil. It also has perfect elemental application, higher damage, and better aimed accuracy in exchange for a slower fire rate.
special.title: It gets the job done.

notes: It uses the Infinity model with an effervescent skin. It was originally planned as Lt. Angvar's effervescent drop, but it was cut before release and replaced by the Infinity.
